arguments.argument:
event_inherited() image_speed=0.1
//Enemy base statistics eName="Vampire Bat" eLevel=12 maxLife=140 life=maxLife pointWorth=10 atkPower=4 resType[2]=4 resType[5]=2 stunResist=1 baseItemChance=40 baseDropIndex=90 affiliation=3 dieEffect=0 initDir=0 bobTime=0 runAcc=2 detectDistY=184 inactiveDist*=2 tauntPlayer=0
deathAnim=0
jeremyText="What can I really say about these things? They just fly in one direction. I mentioned these to Jerry way back before all this Virus nonsense." chaoText="Just in case you don't know, these fly right through walls." devText="This bat AI is totally recycled from the bat in DT1. Ctrl-C and Ctrl-V made this bat what it is now in DT3."
alarm[0]=1
